# External Template Structure - Follow-up Email

## Purpose
Capture common agency follow-up email structure for post-application status checks.

## Source Pattern References
- Hays recruiter follow-up style patterns.

## Canonical Sections
1. Subject line with role + candidate identity.
2. Appreciation opener.
3. One-line fit reminder.
4. Status request and call to action.
5. Professional close and contact details.

## Field Rules
- Tone must remain polite and concise.
- One clear action request per message.
- Mention application date and role title.

## Usage Guidance
Use as structure only; adapt to role and timeline (Day 1, Day 7-10, Day 21).
